headline: **MLB Daily Roundup: May 15, 2026**
article:
The Colorado Rockies suffered a 7-2 loss to the Pittsburgh Pirates, led by Ryan O'Hearn's 3-hit performance, including a home run and 2 RBIs. The Washington Nationals fell to a historic 15-1 defeat at the hands of the Cincinnati Reds, with JJ Bleday driving in 6 runs. The New York Mets secured a 9-4 victory over the Detroit Tigers, while the Minnesota Twins dominated the Miami Marlins 9-1.

Several key players have been affected by injuries, with Cal Raleigh placed on the 10-day injured list due to a right oblique strain. Other notable injured players include Jimmy Herget (right shoulder impingement), Brooks Kriske (right shoulder impingement), Robby Snelling (left elbow UCL sprain), Francisco Alvarez (right meniscus tear), Rhett Lowder (right shoulder pain), Drew Pomeranz (left elbow inflammation), and Dylan Beavers (right oblique strain).

The Baltimore Orioles made a notable trade acquisition, acquiring RHP Eduarniel Núñez from the Athletics in exchange for cash. The Athletics also traded LHP José Suarez to the Seattle Mariners for cash. Additionally, the Arizona Diamondbacks acquired OF Jose Requena from the Los Angeles Dodgers in exchange for CF Alek Thomas, and the San Francisco Giants traded C Patrick Bailey to the Cleveland Guardians for LHP Matt Wilkinson and other considerations.

top_news.title: **Rockies Fall to Pirates in 7-2 Loss**
top_news.summary: The Colorado Rockies suffered a 7-2 defeat at the hands of the Pittsburgh Pirates. Ryan O'Hearn led the Rockies' offense with a 3-hit performance, including a home run and 2 RBIs.

top_news.title: **Nationals Suffer Historic Loss to Reds**
top_news.summary: The Washington Nationals fell to a 15-1 defeat at the hands of the Cincinnati Reds, marking a lopsided victory for the home team. JJ Bleday led the Nationals' offense with a 3-hit, 2-home run performance, driving in 6 runs.

top_news.title: **Mets Take Down Tigers 9-4**
top_news.summary: The New York Mets secured a 9-4 victory over the Detroit Tigers, with Nolan McLean earning the win after pitching 7.0 innings with 7 strikeouts. Gage Workman led the Tigers' offense with 2 hits, 1 home run, and 3 RBIs.

top_news.title: **Twins Rout Marlins 9-1**
top_news.summary: The Minnesota Twins dominated the Miami Marlins, winning 9-1 behind a strong outing from Zebby Matthews. Matthews pitched 7.0 innings, striking out 5 and allowing 0 earned runs.

top_news.title: **Raleigh Lands on Injured List**
top_news.summary: Seattle Mariners catcher Cal Raleigh has been placed on the 10-day injured list due to a right oblique strain.

top_news.title: **Orioles Acquire Eduarniel Núñez in Trade**
top_news.summary: The Baltimore Orioles have acquired RHP Eduarniel Núñez from the Athletics in exchange for cash.
